revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 32x32 pixels.
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column, one frame only.
- Frame size: 32x32 pixels.
- Background: solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space; no gradients, no alpha transparency.
- No grid lines, no separator lines, no borders, no labels, no frame numbers, no text, no watermark.

Subject:
- A single field-prop overlay: an organic irregular curved terrain-boundary patch for a top-down Japanese satoyama fantasy RPG map.
- Shape: asymmetric crescent/L-shaped curved blob, visually thicker on the left and upper-left, tapering into feathered edges on all sides while remaining clearly contained inside the 32x32 cell.
- Content inside the patch: clustered low ferns, mossy ground cover, soft grass clumps, a few tiny warm-brown stones, and subtle dappled leaf-shadow pixels.
- Designed to disguise a right-angle terrain corner as an organic curve.
- Clear collision footprint and readable silhouette.

Pixel art style:
- Crisp low-resolution 16-bit console-style pixel art, no antialiasing blur.
- Fine readable pixel clusters at 32x32 scale.
- One-pixel dark outline only where useful for the main mass; no detached fragments.
- Top-left light source.
- Warm cheerful rural fantasy palette: golden-afternoon greens from #6a9a52 to #3a6a36, mossy browns #7a6a48, tiny warm yellow wildflower accents #e8c860.
- Blend naturally over both grass and path tiles.

Hard failures to avoid:
- No isolated pixel islands, dust specks, seam slivers, leftover residue, or detached fragments.
- Keep a clear solid #FF00FF margin between the patch and every canvas edge.
- No characters, creatures, birds, companion animals, weapons, armor, modern objects, logos, letter emblems, UI, text, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, isometric perspective, or vanishing point.
- Fully original generic Japanese rural fantasy asset; no recognizable franchise likenesses or logos.
